parameters.content:
# Homelab Uptime Monitor v2

**Schedule:** Every 5 minutes
**Alert channel:** Slack
**Deduplication:** Uses workflow static data — alerts once per outage, then on recovery.

### Branch 1 — HTTP Checks (top)
Check → UP path clears static data (recovery alert if was down)
Check → DOWN → wait 10s → recheck → CONFIRMED DOWN → dedupe gate → alert once
**33 sites:** 27 homelab + 6 external

### Branch 2 — Status Page APIs (bottom)
Fetch → parse → HEALTHY clears static data (recovery alert if was incident)
Fetch → parse → INCIDENT → dedupe gate → alert once per indicator change
**9 services:** Claude, OpenAI, GitHub, Cloudflare, Slack, Atlassian, Zoom, JumpCloud, Monday
